Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/plans/create/steps/virtual-machines/VirtualMachinesStepFooter.tsx
2. Apply ONLY the change described by the migration rule at or near line 131
3. Make the minimum edit necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your change (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Write the fixed file
6. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through the fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edit, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists the change you made, or note if the fix was already applied or could not be applied (with a brief reason).
I'll start by reading the file to understand the full context.

Now let me reason through the migration:

**What needs to change:**

1. **`title`, `titleIconVariant`, `description`** props must move from `<Modal>` to a new `<ModalHeader>` child component.

2. **`actions`** prop must move to a new `<ModalFooter>` child component. In PF v6, `actions` is removed — the buttons should become children of `<ModalFooter>`.

3. The existing children (`<VirtualMachinesTable>`) should be wrapped in `<ModalBody>`.

4. **Imports**: Add `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` from `@patternfly/react-core`.

**Resulting structure:**
```jsx
<Modal
  isOpen
  variant={ModalVariant.large}
  onClose={closeModal}
>
  <ModalHeader
    title={t('Confirm selections with critical issues')}
    titleIconVariant="danger"
    description={t('Critical issues...')}
  />
  <ModalBody>
    <VirtualMachinesTable ... />
  </ModalBody>
  <ModalFooter>
    <Button key="confirm" onClick={confirmSelection}>
      {t('Confirm selections')}
    </Button>
    <Button key="deselect" variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={deselectCriticalVms}>
      {t('Deselect critical issue VMs')}
    </Button>
    <Button key="cancel" variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={closeModal}>
      {t('Cancel')}
    </Button>
  </ModalFooter>
</Modal>
```

Let me apply the changes:

arguments.after:
<Modal
          isOpen
          variant={ModalVariant.large}
          onClose={closeModal}
        >
          <ModalHeader
            title={t('Confirm selections with critical issues')}
            titleIconVariant="danger"
            description={t(
              'Critical issues detected in your selected VMs will cause the migration to fail. Resolve these issues or remove the VMs from the plan before starting the migration.',
            )}
          />
          <ModalBody>
            <VirtualMachinesTable
              vmData={criticalVmData}
              initialSelectedIds={Object.keys(vmsWithCriticalIssues)}
              value={pendingVms}
              isSelectable
              onChange={handleVmSelectionChange}
              hasCriticalConcernFilter
            />
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalFooter>
            <Button key="confirm" onClick={confirmSelection}>
              {t('Confirm selections')}
            </Button>
            <Button key="deselect" variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={deselectCriticalVms}>
              {t('Deselect critical issue VMs')}
            </Button>
            <Button key="cancel" variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={closeModal}>
              {t('Cancel')}
            </Button>
          </ModalFooter>
        </Modal>
arguments.before:
<Modal
          isOpen
          variant={ModalVariant.large}
          title={t('Confirm selections with critical issues')}
          titleIconVariant="danger"
          description={t(
            'Critical issues detected in your selected VMs will cause the migration to fail. Resolve these issues or remove the VMs from the plan before starting the migration.',
          )}
          onClose={closeModal}
          actions={[
            <Button key="confirm" onClick={confirmSelection}>
              {t('Confirm selections')}
            </Button>,
            <Button key="deselect" variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={deselectCriticalVms}>
              {t('Deselect critical issue VMs')}
            </Button>,
            <Button key="cancel" variant={ButtonVariant.secondary} onClick={closeModal}>
              {t('Cancel')}
            </Button>,
          ]}
        >
          <VirtualMachinesTable
            vmData={criticalVmData}
            initialSelectedIds={Object.keys(vmsWithCriticalIssues)}
            value={pendingVms}
            isSelectable
            onChange={handleVmSelectionChange}
            hasCriticalConcernFilter
          />
        </Modal>
